## Description

Please describe the changes proposed in this Pull Request (e.g., what bug was fixed, what typo was corrected, what styling improvement was made).

## Type of Change

- [ ] Typo correction
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change in build system or CSS)
- [ ] Styling/layout improvement
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Verification

Please describe how you verified your changes locally:
- [ ] Ran `./dev.sh` to preview page rendering.
- [ ] Confirmed that `uv run build.py` completes without errors.
- [ ] Verified that sitemaps, RSS feeds, and HTML files compile correctly.
